name: zero_guard_start
description: Initial zero plateau for alignment and settle.

name: all_12bit_left_justified_plateaus
description: All signed 12-bit values left-justified into 16-bit PCM, each repeated 16 times. Input code for plateau p is p-2048; sample value is (p-2048)<<4.

name: rounding_probe
description: Short plateaus around selected low-nibble/rounding boundaries.

name: zero_guard_end
description: Trailing zero plateau for end alignment.
